title: Companion — Gesture Tracker
medium: interactive canvas — the same red diagonal burst stays fixed at the upper-left while six procedurally-drawn carriers cycle behind it (linen tabard, mid-century detergent box, supermarket shelf, parking sign, fire-connection brick wall, glass storefront with a SALE sticker). Auto-advances every 6.5 seconds; prev/next available.
caption: The form survives the function. The same shape looks like a different sign every six seconds.
